claim: Two independent complete real-cache builds produce byte-identical artifacts.

difference_found_and_fixed.symptom: fast build counted 3 prior starts vs reference 2; eligibility flipped
difference_found_and_fixed.root_cause: a chronologically-prior start was suspended and its label became available after this game's prediction cutoff, so the reference excludes it; the pure chronological prefix wrongly included it
difference_found_and_fixed.category: availability-filter (not ordering, float, null, schema, or serialization)
difference_found_and_fixed.fix: route pitchers whose cutoffs are non-decreasing and whose labels precede the next cutoff through the fast prefix path; all others fall back to the exact reference builder for that pitcher

read_phase_diagnosis.cause: per-file parquet open + column read + full-file SHA-256 (second read) plus Windows per-open scanning; not a hang - CPU and file count advanced monotonically
read_phase_diagnosis.note: the window-builder optimization made the windowing stage near-instant; remaining cost is source I/O and is environmental
